title: 🎁5day work !! High Commission !! Sales Beauty Consultant🎁
description:
Company Overview / Employee Value Proposition

Founded in 2007, Apex Retail brings premium international skincare brands to prestigious Asian markets. The combination of top-quality products and customer service has brought the company to where it is today - a successful luxury beauty and skincare retailer in Asia, with over 140 employees across Singapore and Hong Kong!

Job Summary

Join Apex Retail’s sales team to actively promote and sell premium skincare products, deliver expert advice, and build strong customer relationships to achieve sales targets and enhance the customer shopping experience.

Responsibilities

  • Promote and sell skincare products to achieve or exceed monthly sales targets
  • Stay updated on skincare product features and market trends to provide accurate and expert advice to customers
  • Assist customers by assessing their skincare needs and recommending suitable products to enhance their satisfaction
  • Demonstrate proper use of skincare products to customers to increase product understanding and encourage purchases
  • Build and maintain positive customer relationships by following up on their skincare needs and feedback
  • Collaborate with team members to deliver a seamless and enjoyable shopping experience for customers
  • Mentor and guide junior staff to support their development and improve team performance

Required competencies and certifications

  • Experience in the beauty or skincare industry with a focus on sales and customer service
  • Demonstrated leadership skills with the ability to mentor and guide junior staff

What are you waiting for? Click Apply to join and be a part of Singapore's TOP Leading Retailer Group!

  • 5day per week
  • shift work time :10:00 a.m. to 7:00 p.m / 11:00 a.m. to 8:00 p.m.
  • Basic from $3500 - $4500
  • High Commission rate

postedCompany.description:
Founded in 2007, Apex Retail brings premium international skincare brands to prestigious Asian markets. Over the years, we expanded extensively on our product offerings, retail channels as well as our growing team to meet the ever-changing needs and demands of the market. To ensure our products and services quality, each of the brands undergoes careful selections from the most exclusive international sources for their luxurious, unique, and effective ingredients which differentiates us from our competitors. Building high-end retail concept stores at premium locations further aid in developing brand values that attract customers and their loyalty.


Apex Retail also prided itself in its first-class customer service with the highest customer satisfaction guaranteed. We house a strong team of customer service officers who specializes in handling all customer inquiries, needs, and expectations. The combination of top-quality products and customer service has brought the company to where it is today - a successful luxury beauty and skincare retailer in Asia, with over 140 employees across Singapore and Hong Kong!


We believe in establishing a long and successful journey with our team members, taking the company and each other to new heights.  Therefore, we train and support the team and make efforts to make the company a place where everyone can thrive.


What are you waiting for? Click Apply to join and be a part of Singapore's TOP Leading Retailer Group!


Would you like to hear more from us? Click on the link below:

https://www.apexretail.com.sg/get-to-know-us
postedCompany.name: APEX RETAIL PTE. LTD.
